verified_ok.claim: adapter exact argv is accounts onboard --json with no browser args
evidence: tests/test_web_design_command_adapter.py asserts accounts_onboard has no required or allowed args
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js runOnboardFromModal calls maybeConfirmAndRun("onboard_account") without extra payload
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts accounts_onboard raw action and auth/path/credential/backend fields are rejected

verified_ok.claim: outcome mapper does not overclaim onboarding success
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py _onboarding_summary gates success on top-level ok, admitted final_outcome, reserve_first_enforced, reserve pool, no active routing change, and selected backend proof
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py covers no_new_auth_detected, ambiguous_new_auth_detection, missing onboarding_result, validate_failed, and top-level command error as non-success

verified_ok.claim: selected backend id is exposed only for admitted reserve-first success
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py emits selected_backend_id only when onboarding ui_state is success
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts non-success onboarding summaries do not expose selected_backend_id

verified_ok.claim: modal has no file picker, path, credentials, or backend id inputs
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/index.html modal copy states browser does not send auth paths, source dirs, credentials, or backend ids
tests/test_web_design_ui.py guards against file input, source_dir, auth_ref, credentials, password, backend_id, raw accounts onboard, and auto-promote copy

verified_ok.claim: post-action truth refresh remains accounts readonly
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js refreshes accounts readonly when current screen is Accounts
